---
title: "Interfacial Atomistic Evolution in Sodium-Ion Battery using a Graph-Theoretic Approach"
author: [
  "Yongqing Gong",
  "Yuxin Fan",
  "Yilin Chen",
  "Mauricio R. Bonilla",
  "Henry Andres Cortes",
  "Chenlong Gao",
  "Yunhui Huang",
  "Menghao Yang"
]
date: 2025-12-26
publication: "Small, **22**, e11841, (2026)"
categories: ["Li-ion"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1002/smll.202511841
url_preprint:
journ: "Small"
issue: 22
page: e11841
year: 2026
image: featured.png
pub_number: 16
---
